temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) At night, a man in a black jacket gets out of the driver's side of a dark car. Another man in a black shirt and cap gets out of the passenger side. The first man places a comforting hand on the second man's shoulder, and they both get back into the car, driving away into the darkness. (Storyline: This opening scene establishes a mysterious and tense situation, showing two men getting into a car under the cover of darkness, hinting at a clandestine or dangerous activity.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of a car door closing and the engine starting.)
